nasb.text: Of the sons of Benjamin, Saul’s kinsmen, 3,000; for until now the greatest part of them had kept their allegiance to the house of Saul.

esv.text: Of the Benjaminites, the kinsmen of Saul, 3,000, of whom the majority had to that point kept their allegiance to the house of Saul.

cnv.text: 便雅憫支派的子孫中，掃羅的親族也有三千人，直到現在他們多半支持掃羅家。

ccb.text: 扫罗的亲族、便雅悯支派中有三千人，大部分便雅悯人仍然效忠扫罗家；
